description: EAD Enterprise Suite MCP — signature workflows, evidence, notifications, dossiers for enterprises.
name: io.github.g-digital-by-Garrigues/ead-enterprise-suite

environmentVariables.description: Flow 1: Email / password description: Your GoCertius account email address isSecret: false
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: description: Your GoCertius account password isSecret: true (See https://www.eadtrust.eu/soluciones-legaltech/enterprise-suite/ for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: description: OpenID Connect client ID isSecret: false
environmentVariables.name: MCP_OPENID_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Flow 2: OpenID Connect (alternative to email/password) description: OpenID Connect issuer URL isSecret: false
environmentVariables.name: MCP_OPENID_ISSUER

environmentVariables.description: description: OpenID Connect refresh token isSecret: true (See https://www.eadtrust.eu/soluciones-legaltech/enterprise-suite/ for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_OPENID_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Transport (optional) description: HTTP port when running in hosted (HTTP) mode; ignored in stdio mode isSecret: false
environmentVariables.name: PORT
